# Chart.js Visualization Skill

When implementing charts in React apps:

- Use Chart.js as the default charting library.
- Keep chart configuration readable and typed.
- Prefer accessible labels, legends, and tooltip text.
- Keep color palette consistent with the app visual system.
- Avoid excessive chart decoration and animation noise.
- Ensure charts remain readable on mobile and desktop.

## Checklist

- Is Chart.js used unless explicitly overridden?
- Are datasets and labels typed clearly?
- Is chart data prepared outside JSX where possible?
- Are axis labels and legends understandable?
- Is chart layout responsive and legible at small widths?
